name: We Drive U
owner_or_parent: independent (NOT the national WeDriveU corporate-shuttle firm)
districts_or_customers: None identified; no school district contracts.
recent_news: No news. Address (660 Morningside Dr, Grand Blanc) is a residential single-family home per Redfin, indicating a sole-proprietor/home-based operation. NOT the national WeDriveU corporate-shuttle firm (which is HQ in Burlingame, CA, owned by Mitsui & Co., and recently rebranded from National Express Transit) — name collision only.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate. Almost certainly a designated-driver / sober-ride micro business operating from a home address, NOT a school bus contractor. The national WeDriveU brand is a separate large transit operator (Mitsui-owned) and would be a strategic, not a tuck-in. Exclude.
